'''''Zack 1''''' was a [[Delta-class DX-9 stormtrooper transport]] used by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Aftermath of Hoth]]. During one of [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele's]] sorties against the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]], Imperial forces destroyed Calamari Cruiser [[Lulsla (MC40a light cruiser)|''Lulsla'']], forcing its commander to abandon ship aboard [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|Shuttle]] ''[[Derris]]''. Maarek Stele aided in the disabling of Shuttle group ''Derris''. Having disabled the two Shuttles, Imperial forces launched ''Zack 1'' to board and capture them.

{{Ship-stub}}
